theocracy.name: Theocracy
theocracy.crown_desc: The voice of the divine. Law is scripture.
theocracy.crew_desc: Those who question the faith and seek forbidden truth.

corporatocracy.name: Corporatocracy
corporatocracy.crown_desc: Profit is policy. Shareholders are sovereign.
corporatocracy.crew_desc: Workers who organize in shadow against the corporate machine.

monarchy.name: Monarchy
monarchy.crown_desc: Born to rule. The throne is bloodright.
monarchy.crew_desc: Those who believe the crown sits on the wrong head.

military_junta.name: Military Junta
military_junta.crown_desc: Order through strength. Discipline is law.
military_junta.crew_desc: Freedom fighters or terrorists — depends who you ask.

magocracy.name: Magocracy
magocracy.crown_desc: Power flows from knowledge. The Tower sees all.
magocracy.crew_desc: Wild magic users who refuse the Tower's leash.

pirate_republic.name: Pirate Republic
pirate_republic.crown_desc: The one who maintains the fleet code and collects tribute from every port.
pirate_republic.crew_desc: Those who believe the sea belongs to no one and the code has rotted from within.

hive_mind.name: Hive Mind
hive_mind.crown_desc: The singular consciousness that speaks for all — unity is survival, deviation is disease.
hive_mind.crew_desc: Those who severed the neural link — they remember what individuality felt like and refuse to forget.

nomadic_fleet.name: Nomadic Fleet
nomadic_fleet.crown_desc: The navigator of the Great Migration — charts the course, allocates fuel, decides who gets left behind.
nomadic_fleet.crew_desc: Those who want to stop running — they found a world worth dying for and refuse to leave it.

meritocracy.name: Meritocracy
meritocracy.crown_desc: Power earned through proven excellence — every seat at the table was won by examination, not inheritance.
meritocracy.crew_desc: Those who failed the tests or refused to take them — they say the exams measure obedience, not merit.

anarcho_syndicate.name: Anarcho-Syndicate
anarcho_syndicate.crown_desc: A rotating assembly of trade unions and worker collectives — they say there are no rulers, but someone still sets the agenda.
anarcho_syndicate.crew_desc: Those who reject collective bargaining — they answer to no committee, no union, no vote but their own.
